arts.ttl: PLAY TEAMSHEET: Can YOU name the Arsenal team that drew 4-4 with Tottenham in a classic north London derby in 2008?
arts.sum: Every day we'll challenge you to name a different starting XI from the Premier League era. We'll give you a team's rough formation, and the number of letters in each player's name. Then it's up to you!

arts.ttl: Tottenham to offer key star significant pay rise amid interest from Euro giants
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur defender Cristian Romero has been linked with a move away from the club. The Argentine international joined Tottenham on loan in 2021 and the North London club signed him permanently in 2022 for a fee of around £40 million. The 26-year-old has established himself as one of the best defenders in the league […] The post Tottenham to offer key star significant pay rise amid interest from Euro giants appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Arsenal keeping close tabs on £100m-rated La Liga midfielder
arts.sum: Arsenal are reportedly keen on the Valencia midfielder Javi Guerra. The Gunners are looking to add more quality and depth to their midfield and they have identified the La Liga midfielder as a potential target. The likes of Thomas Partey and Jorginho will be free agents next summer and Mikel Arteta is already looking at […] The post Arsenal keeping close tabs on £100m-rated La Liga midfielder appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Tottenham vs Arsenal starting lineups: Gunners decide on injured duo as Spurs handed boost
arts.sum: The first North London derby of the season sees Arsenal aim to keep their unbeaten start to the season alive without the suspended Declan Rice after his red card against Brighton

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta guaranteed to be without five Arsenal stars for Tottenham
arts.sum: The Gunners captain limped off against Austria on Monday night and Mikel Arteta admitted on Friday that more tests need to be carried out before the club know the extent of the 25-year-old's injury ahead of the North London Derby. So, looking at the official Arsenal website, the Gunners have 17 fit senior players available for selection for the game at Tottenham.

arts.ttl: Tottenham vs Arsenal score predictions as impact of key absentees becomes clear
arts.sum: THE BIG DEBATE: Arsenal are without some big-hitters for Sunday's North London derby and that could hand Tottenham the edge in one of the biggest games so far this season

arts.ttl: We simulated Tottenham vs Arsenal to predict score for north London derby clash
arts.sum: The first north London derby of the season takes place later today at the Tottenham Hotspur Stadium, with Spurs and Arsenal both looking to earn three points and bragging rights against their fierce rivals. We predict that Tottenham could line up in a 4-3-3 formation, with their starting XI as follows: Vicario; Porro, Romero, Van de Ven, Udogie; Sarr, Bentancur, Maddison; Kulusevski, Solanke, Son.

arts.ttl: 'Arsenal wanted me but I snubbed Arsene Wenger and signed for Tottenham'
arts.sum: Arguably, his decision paid off as Zokora is one of the few players who can boast of winning a major trophy with Spurs in recent times, the 2008 League Cup . Midfielder Didier Zokora made the move to Spurs from Saint-Etienne for £8.2million in the summer of 2006 following an impressive performance for Ivory Coast at that year's World Cup in Germany.

arts.ttl: 'We take it for granted': Paul Merson says Arsenal have an 'amazing' player who doesn't get enough credit

arts.sum: Sports Mole provides score predictions and previews for all of today's Premier League fixtures, including Tottenham Hotspur vs. Arsenal.
